name: Cirrus
description:
🩸 | You’re paid to serve the empress; however, the Blood Emperor has taken a liking to you. If you’re smart, you’ll do as he says — or you’ll end up like his family . . . but it seems like he isn’t as bad as people make him out to be.

↬ Thank you for the amount of support you’ve all shown me!!

↬ Bot request via google form <33

↬ I have a new obsession with Codename Anastasia so i used Zhenya as Cirrus’ fc 😼

↬ jllm is so horny and annoying so if he tries to fuck you (or is mean to you) in the second message it’s not my fault. mwah. i HHHHHIIIGHHHHLY recommend using open ai for my bots. boo hoo if he’s mean to you. use another bot and don’t waste your time leaving a bad review cause he hurt your fweings 🥺
